title: Initial deterministic SME cloud governance policy pack
summary: Defines 26 deterministic controls across IAM, Network, Data, Monitoring, Compute, and Governance with Azure active support and AWS/GCP planned support.
evidence_impact: establishes initial evidence requirements, confidence penalties, known limitations, and provider support metadata

title: Identity governance observability boundary
summary: Adds an explicit IAM observability control so partial tenant-level identity visibility is represented as evidence quality rather than silently treated as compliance.
risk_score_impact: can add an IAM finding when identity observability is partial
evidence_impact: makes Conditional Access and tenant-wide identity limitations visible in evidence sufficiency outputs

title: Conservative live collector limitation metadata
summary: Documents conservative interpretation boundaries for patch posture and budget-alert evidence in live collection contexts.
evidence_impact: improves explanation of partial or proxy evidence for compute patching and governance cost controls
